posts.author: Nitya (Nitya Dhakar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In Monday Work Management, you create projects through the portfolio dashboard. Only the owners of the portfolio/dashboard are able to update the project health status for projects. I want to allow the project board owners to update their own project health status.

What are you trying to achieve

Decrease reliance on only a select few individuals to update the dashboard and empower project owners to update their own project statuses.
